NAVAREA XIX 25/24

 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT  171830 UTC MAR 24

 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.



 65-13.1N 006-54.4E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE
 65-40.0N 007-43.9E FLOATEL ENDURANCE
 71-15.6N 022-15.6E  TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
 73-27.0N 024-24.0E DEEPSEA STAVANGER



 NOTES:

 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.

 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW

 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　23/24
